name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Peter, I’m asking you to speak out
body:
It's not who we are | Peter, this election is a moment of reckoning for our country.

We must finally -- and definitively -- answer the question of whether we will accept a man like Donald Trump as our president.

Every day, more people from all parties are standing up and saying “enough is enough.” We’ve seen some real profiles in courage -- but too many good people are staying silent.

**[So today, Peter, I'm asking you to speak out. Will you chip in to show the world where you stand?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYzNDI4NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTU5ODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’ve had enough of Trump demonizing immigrants, Muslims, and people of color for his own crass political gain. I see the effect this is having on America -- on our children -- and I’m deeply upset by it. The other day, I got a letter from a mom in Nevada who told me her 10-year-old daughter, adopted from China, lies awake every night worrying she’ll be taken from her family because of what she hears Trump say on TV. I’ve gotten letters like this from adoptive parents all over America who want me to know their kids are afraid. It’s sickening -- and it’s wrong. There’s no other way to say it.

In this campaign, Donald Trump is betting that Americans will be narrow-minded and self-interested, because that’s what he is.

But it’s not who we are.

We’re a big-hearted, fair-minded country. We don’t make children afraid for their futures -- we make them excited for all the opportunities they’ll have to fulfill their dreams.

So here’s my question for you, Peter: Are you ready to work to help our country live up to its founding promise? Or are you going to throw in the towel and accept that perhaps we really are as divisive and angry as Donald Trump makes us out to be?

**If you’re ready to keep fighting -- and I truly hope you are -- I need to know you’re with me. Let’s draw a line in the sand -- and together, let’s show the world what it means to be American:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzNDI4NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTU5ODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjYzNDI4NDAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTU5ODM2S0&mt=1&rt=0)

body:
Peter --

This is a big weekend for Trump Team Virginia!

We will be out across the Commonwealth door knocking on Saturday, August 27 starting at 9:30am. The **top door knockers** will be invited to a lunch with _Lara Trump, Lynne Patton, and Omarosa Manigault_ on Sunday August 28th.

[Click here](http://virginia-donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/sign_up_to_knock_on_doors?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_meetup_08251&n=1 "http://virginia-donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/sign_up_to_knock_on_doors") to register for Saturday's door knocking event with Trump Team Virginia!

Don't forget - Governor Mike Pence will be in Purcellville at Patrick Henry College Saturday for a rally starting at 3pm!

[Click here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.donaldjtrump.com%2Fschedule%2Fregister%2Fpurcellville-va1%2F&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_meetup_08251&n=2 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/purcellville-va1/") to get tickets for Governor Pence's rally.

[Click here](http://virginia-donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/come_to_this_event_in_virginia?e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=va_meetup_08251&n=3 "http://virginia-donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/come_to_this_event_in_virginia") to get tickets for Sunday's event!

Trump Team Virginia is looking forward to seeing you this weekend!

Trump Team Virginia

subject: prove that we're going to rally around her.
body:
What Trump is trying to do | Derek --

This week, at a rally in Mississippi, Donald Trump stood in front of an almost all-white crowd and called Hillary a bigot.

The absurdity of this should go without saying.

But I want to make sure you understand what Trump’s trying to do. He’s making a deliberate choice to fill the air with so much garbage and slander that we run screaming in the other direction. He's trying to make this election so nasty that the only people who bother to follow through with voting on Election Day are the die-hard supporters who will follow Trump anywhere.

**[Don’t let him pull it off -- and get yourself a free sticker, too.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjYzNDI2NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTUzNTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Show him that bit-by-bit, we’re blotting out all the disgusting, hateful things he’s saying with a lot of hard work and a little love and kindness.

While he’s slinging mud, we’re staying up late to register more voters and recruit more volunteers.

When he dreams up a new way to slander Hillary, prove that we're going to rally around her.

**Chip in right now to make 100% sure that not one person has to listen to anything Donald Trump says after November 8th:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjYzNDI2NTUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTUzNTU3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Christina

Deputy Communications Director

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: End Fracking on Public Lands
body:
Dear Activist,

Imagine starting out on a hike or driving through your favorite national forest, and this is your view: **swaths of trees that have been clearcut, hordes of trucks flying along back roads and fracking rigs scattered across the landscape**.

Because our public lands are currently open to fracking, this dirty and dangerous image could become more common for visitors to our national forests and wilderness areas. **[Sign the petition if you think our national forests and other public lands should be protected from fracking](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/QwMM/6/q/r5cs/6FZ0Rv/vzsYnckRFs)**.

As a Colorado native, I am lucky to have the awe-inspiring Rocky Mountains and many areas of public land right in my backyard. Just the other weekend, I went hiking in Arapahoe National Forest. I cannot imagine going out and seeing a clearing with a huge fracking well pad, instead of these beautiful trees. [**Our national forests and public lands are too precious to frack**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/QwMM/s/q/r5cs/6FZ0Rv/vOMklNqdGF).

**But fracking is already happening in national forests and public lands across the country** -- from Pennsylvania's Allegheny National Forest to the border of Glacier National Park; from illegal fracking in the Florida Everglades to George Washington National Forest in Virginia (which was recently approved for fracking).

**Thanks to the incredible opposition to fracking that has grown across the country** , U.S. Representative Mark Pocan (WI-2) and co-sponsor Jan Schakowsky (IL-9) introduced a bill to ban fracking on all public lands. **[This bill is the strongest piece of federal legislation against fracking to be introduced to date](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/QwMM/v/q/r5cs/6FZ0Rv/vU5JWz8pzS)**.

While Food & Water Watch members have already made it clear that fracking should be banned on our public lands (along with allies, we submitted more than 650,000 comments from people like you against the Obama administration's proposed rules for fracking on public lands), **the oil and gas industry is pushing back**. They will do everything they can to kill this bill so they can keep fracking our public lands.

**That 's why we need to make sure that this bill has an impressive list of co-sponsors and supporters in Congress. [Ask your representative to co-sponsor this bill to protect our public lands from fracking](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/QwMM/z/q/r5cs/6FZ0Rv/UGzazKSzQn)**.

I want to be able to enjoy our parks and forests for years to come, and I want to make sure there will be protected wilderness for future generations to experience. **[Join me in standing up to protect our public lands from fracking today](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/QwMM/U/q/r5cs/6FZ0Rv/s1CA7pf6j2)**.

Thanks for taking action,

Caitlin Seeley George

Caitlin Seeley George
Online Organizer
Food & Water Watch
act(at)fwwatch(dot)org

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDIvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS83NDkxMDcz)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

body:
_This is our Link of the Week email -- the things that we're sharing around the office, and we think everyone on Team Maggie should know about. _
Washington Republican-backed groups have spent more than $24 million to stop Governor Hassan from winning, so false attack ads are par for the course. But a recent, misleading ad on the opioid crisis goes so far beyond the pale that a local addiction recovery advocate called it "preposterous" and "madness." The fact is, Governor Hassan is a leader in the fight to combat the opioid crisis:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7c3/2a380d31/11d4f775/fa6b1c/2339198413/VEsH/ "http://nhpr.org/post/drug-treatment-advocate-attacks-hassan-gop-funded-ad-campaign")
It's unacceptable that out-of-state groups are trying to use a devastating public health crisis for political gain. [**This article from New Hampshire Public Radio gives more background on these baseless attacks and how Governor Hassan is fighting the opioid epidemic.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7c3/2a380d31/11d4f775/fa6b1c/2339198413/VEsE/ "http://nhpr.org/post/drug-treatment-advocate-attacks-hassan-gop-funded-ad-campaign")

name: Jessica Feingold Lieberson
subject: My dad, Russ
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
On Women's Equality Day, I want to tell you a little bit about two women in my life named Sylvia. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4472/1c469400/72bcebe/3574035/766412919/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-womensweek?utm_source=ema_2016-08-26_JFL_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-26_JFL_nd&utm_campaign=JFL&utm_medium=ema") Friend, On Women's Equality Day, I want to tell you a little bit about two women in my life named Sylvia. The first was my grandmother, Sylvia, known to me as "Granny." She was ahead of her time -- a well-educated woman with a successful career who, incredibly, spoke six languages, was actively engaged in her community, and whose commitment and love of family was always her greatest priority. Granny was a huge inspiration for our whole family, and her values and work ethic live on in all of us. **My grandma Sylvia had a tremendous influence on my dad, Russ. She's a big reason he is who he is: an independent mind who always stands up for what he knows is right.** The second Sylvia is my daughter, Sylvia Violet, who we named after my grandmother. Baby Sylvia has her grandpa Russ's eyes. And all it takes is one giggle to see she has the same smile and optimism as her namesake. I love my dad for many reasons. He always has my back and knows exactly how to make me laugh. But one of the best things about my dad is that he cares so passionately about equality for all women. I know my grandma would be proud that he's made issues like paid family leave and equal pay centerpieces of his campaign. But now as a mother, what makes me most proud of my dad is knowing he is working his hardest to make sure my daughter grows up in a world where she's empowered to be anything -- _especially because she's a woman._ [**This week, you heard from some amazing women about why they're supporting my dad, Russ. Now, I'm asking: Will you stand with him too? Help us close out our Women for Russ week by making a grassroots contribution of $5 to my dad's campaign.**](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4472/1c469400/72bcebe/3574035/766412919/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-womensweek?utm_source=ema_2016-08-26_JFL_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-26_JFL_nd&utm_campaign=JFL&utm_medium=ema") I'm so proud of my dad. I can't wait until he's back in the Senate standing up for all of us. Sincerely, Jessica Feingold Lieberson | [CONTRIBUTE »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4472/1c469400/72bcebe/3574035/766412919/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-womensweek?utm_source=ema_2016-08-26_JFL_nd&refcode=ema_2016-08-26_JFL_nd&utm_campaign=JFL&utm_medium=ema")

body:
Dear Peter,

I am on the road kicking off our statewide tour, but I received an important update today from our fundraising team -- **we are short of our finance goal for this month.**

[I'm counting on your support](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=4e8dca2da1&e=84041254e6) to win in November.

Chris Koster and his liberal friends are spending millions to defeat me -- and they currently have about $7 million more than we do. They are desperate to hold onto their power and will say and do anything.

We can't let them win. I know you don't want to see four more years of epic failure for our state. My team has set up a unique online goal to make sure we hit our numbers **by Saturday evening -- which will put us back on track**.

**[Can you donate $250, $150, or even $50 now](http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=ae11e9f167&e=84041254e6)** to help me fight against Chris Koster and his liberal special interest friends? Best,

Eric Greitens

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: stand with me, Derek
body:
The type of people Trump lifts up | Derek --

I want to take a minute to address the idea that Donald Trump is anything other than the rock-throwing bully he’s proven himself to be since day one of his candidacy.

This is a man, after all, who launched his bid for the White House by calling Mexican immigrants “rapists” and “criminals.” This is a candidate who regularly retweets white supremacists. Who blasted out an anti-Semitic image over Twitter -- a graphic originally posted on a white nationalist website. A guy who publicly gushes over the reputation of Alex Jones: The conspiracy-theorist radio host who claims that the Sandy Hook massacre was just a hoax.

The people that Trump lifts up are the type who take pride in being prejudiced. They are eager to race-bait and enjoy fanning flames of discrimination and distrust. Today they support his campaign. If he wins this election, Trump will be elevating their voices from the White House.

Let’s take one of his latest hires: Steve Bannon, the former leading man of the alt-right, conservative-fringe website _Breitbart_.

Under Bannon’s leadership, _Breitbart_ published articles with headlines such as: “Would You Rather Your Child Had Feminism or Cancer?” and “Hoist It High And Proud: The Confederate Flag Proclaims A Glorious Heritage.”

But Bannon’s just the latest example of the nasty, toxic ultra-conservative undercurrent that’s been influencing Trump for over a year now.

There’s always been a paranoid fringe in our politics, steeped in racial resentment. But it’s never had the nominee of a major party stoking it, encouraging it, and giving it a national megaphone. Until now. Donald Trump has given them a microphone, bringing them out of shadows and planting them center stage in our national dialogue.

**Derek, Trump is running a campaign fueled by callousness and divisiveness. To me, that’s flat-out unacceptable -- and should concern all Americans, regardless of party. Today, I’m taking a stand against this movement of hate. Please, chip in now to stand with me in this fight:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNDI5NDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTY0Mzg4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
This is the most consequential election of our lifetimes, Derek. We need you more than ever.

Thanks,

Hillary

|
**Hillary needs you now more than ever -- chip in $1 and be one of the more than 2 million grassroots donors standing with her:**

| [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNDI5NDYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0NTY0Mzg4S0&mt=1&rt=0)

subject: Exclusive Opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Act now for your chance to be a special guest at an exclusive campaign dinner with Donald Trump! |

[](http://rnctracking.gop/t/ecgbaINzBAAWRf1uNuaE0MtDRMN6aaaaJWZfBL1BG-wa?o=8@v~37w9&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=Y&3=&l=628070EXohtYx42czbEXuhgfj4zl0gv494iVu4pZi4z4z4nZEl&z4z)

Peter,

One of the best parts of campaigning is all the amazing people I get to meet everywhere I go.

I wish I had more time to personally meet -- to sit down and have a great dinner and talk about the issues driving this historic campaign for change -- with **_every single one of the tremendous Americans coming out to see me in huge venues across the country._**

But for one lucky winner, that's exactly what I'm happy to offer -- a unique sit-down with me.
**[ENTER NOW](http://rnctracking.gop/t/ecgbaINzBAAWRf1uNuaE0MtDRMN6aaaaJWZfBL1BG-wa?o=8@v~37w9&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=c&3=&l=628070EXohtYx42czbEXuhgfj4zl0gv494iVu4pZi4z4z4nZEl&z4z)**

I'm emailing only a few select people right now about this HUGE opportunity to join me on the campaign trail.

I'm only extending this exclusive invite to my most loyal and dedicated supporters, _so this opportunity will go fast._

[**Contribute $5 or more to be automatically entered for a chance at winning this exciting night out with me.**](http://rnctracking.gop/t/ecgbaINzBAAWRf1uNuaE0MtDRMN6aaaaJWZfBL1BG-wa?o=8@v~37w9&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=V&3=&l=628070EXohtYx42czbEXuhgfj4zl0gv494iVu4pZi4z4z4nZEl&z4z)

Peter, Americans like YOU are the heart and soul of this movement -- I'm just the messenger.

That's why I am extending this exclusive opportunity to you today. _**I 'd like to thank you for your support and take you out to dinner.**_

If you are the lucky winner, I'll fly you to our campaign stop, arrange for your transportation and then dine with you that night.

All you have to do is make a contribution of $5 or more, and you will be automatically entered to win.
[](http://rnctracking.gop/t/ecgbaINzBAAWRf1uNuaE0MtDRMN6aaaaJWZfBL1BG-wa?o=8@v~37w9&Y=jj2crfomA1_mggcr.Wug&r=Y&3=&l=628070EXohtYx42czbEXuhgfj4zl0gv494iVu4pZi4z4z4nZEl&z4z)
_A roundtrip flight, transportation, hotel and dinner with ME --**NOW THAT 'S A GREAT DEAL -- trust me, I know.**_

Once a winner has been selected, my campaign team will work with your schedule to make it work. So don't worry about timing and schedules, **just enter now to win the chance of a lifetime.**

Without dedicated supporters like you, my campaign would be nowhere. That's why I'm so excited to give back to one lucky winner with an exclusive chance to join me on the campaign trail and have dinner with me.

name: Steve Bullock
subject: I wish it wasn't necessary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Steve Bullock - Democrat, P
body:
---
Friend,

I know we email you a lot. I mean it when I say I wish it wasn't necessary. The thing is, we're 74 days away from Election Day, and the stakes couldn't be higher. This email is a little long, but I hope you'll take the time to read it.

We've hit the point in the campaign where falling short, even just a bit, has a huge impact. **Right now we 're $5,960 away from our goal. [Will you pitch in $15 to help before our deadline tomorrow?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=HBin1h80OlkTlqq36GNEpPwzAMxMT7gn)**

Next week my kids head back to school, and it reminds me all the more of how important this election is. As I worked to make record investments in our public schools, it wasn't political to me. It was personal -- because my children and thousands of others across our state are depending on our public education system to get the skills they need to compete in a global economy.

When I reach across the aisle to balance the budget and build up our rainy day fund, it's because I know that our ability to invest in our schools, roads and bridges, as well as our ability to keep growing our economy, depends on our fiscal responsibility.

And, as I've spent my career defending public access, it's because I want my kids to be able to fish the same streams and hike the same trails that my wife Lisa and I did growing up.

Greg Gianforte has a much different approach -- his agenda takes money out of public schools and jeopardizes our fiscal responsibility to give the wealthiest Montanans (himself included) a giant tax break. He filed suit to end a public access easement on his property and donated tens of thousands of dollars to groups that want to sell our public lands off to the highest bidder.

I know most Montanans don't agree with his policies. But he's already bought a total of $2.7 million of TV advertisements and has promised to match "dollar for dollar" every contribution that comes into his campaign. He is clearly counting on simply being able to buy his way into the governor's office.

The outpouring of grassroots support has been incredible, and it's helping to counteract Greg Gianforte's millions. **But in this final stretch, it's all the more critical that our fundraising stays on track.[Can I count on you for a donation of $15 before midnight tomorrow?](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=r5qZOGi8hsA2Qed8DHPGbPwzAMxMT7gn)**

Thanks,
Steve Bullock

| This week Vermonters saw the clear choice they have in the general election for Governor and the stark contrast between candidates. Team Scott is working hard to ensure Vermonters know what’s at stake in November. Here are a few of this week’s highlights from the state’s most energetic and hardworking campaign.

**A STARK CONTRAST IN FIRST DEBATE**
This week Phil and his opponent participated in the first debate of the general election, and Phil demonstrated why he is **the only choice for Vermont’s next Governor**. Hosted by Vermont’s National Education Association, Phil made clear that improving the economy is essential to solving the challenges of our education system and providing quality education for our youth.

What was clear from this debate is that Phil is the **_only candidate_** who will **make improving the economy the top priority, who has a plan for fiscally responsible budgeting, and who _will not raise your taxes_!** Phil understands the demographic challenges we face that are not only effecting our workforce, but our schools as well. That’s why he supports school choice, will work to align spending with our actual needs, and measure success based on specific outcomes. As Phil told the audience at Chandler Music Hall, **he will not overpromise and he will not let you down**. Read more about the debate from [_Seven Days_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=ae8ca430eb&e=19cebfe173) and [_VT Digger_](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=60970345f8&e=19cebfe173), and keep up-to-date on Phil’s plans as Governor [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=7800b7e91c&e=19cebfe173).

**Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT** ***
**THE RIGHT PRIORITIES FOR VERMONT**
Phil sat down with the _Stowe Reporter_ this week and shared his plans as Governor. The _Reporter_ highlights where Phil will focus to get our economy moving:

“**Boosting Vermont’s economy**? Priority.
**Bringing people to Vermont** and keeping them there? Priority.
Resolving (read: **killing) the Vermont Health Connect debacle**? Priority.
**Going over the state’s budgets with a fine-tooth comb** , looking for efficiencies? Big priority.
Other priorities...**early childhood education** and **helping young Vermonters gain the financial footing** to stay here and raise their families.”

We think this approach is spot on, and we need a Governor who knows: “**Nothing is more important than making the economy Montpelier’s priority** ,” as Phil told the _Reporter_. Phil also shared how he’ll **address our shrinking workforce** , work tirelessly to **make state government more efficient and less costly** , and **reduce the cost of living** for all Vermonters.

Make sure you are well-informed on what Phil will do for you as Governor by reading the wide-ranging interview [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=329c63254a&e=19cebfe173).
*******
**THIS ELECTION IS ABOUT MONEY – YOUR MONEY**
ICYMI, [be sure to check out Phil’s op-ed in the Times Argus](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=06ac9a9748&e=19cebfe173), which gives an in-depth look at his vision for Vermont, his core principles and his plans to lead Vermont toward a more prosperous future. As Phil writes, the real issues in this campaign are that “**state spending and the costs of living are growing too quickly, and our economy is growing too slowly**.”

In the article, Phil outlines his approach for ending our unsustainable spending and concludes “making Vermont more affordable, growing the economy and keeping and creating jobs must be the top priorities of our next governor**. A healthier economy -- energized by a stable cost of living, a declining tax burden and a steady hand at the helm of state government -- is the best way to invest in our future.** ” Read the full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e15841be04&e=19cebfe173).
***
**WE’RE NOT SLOWING DOWN ANYTIME SOON**
Team Scott kept its momentum going this week, hitting the fairgrounds at the **Orleans County Fair** and **Vermont State Fair** , enjoying BBQ in**Windsor County** and **Castleton** , meeting and greeting with Vermonters in **Morrisville** and **Burlington’s Breakwaters** , and stopping by the **Welch Barn** and **Parro’s Gun Shop**. We had an amazing week discussing the economic challenges and hopes of Vermonters, and seeing some of the great cultural and business treasures our state has to offer.
**Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT**
Want to participate in an upcoming event? Check out our events page [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=4eeb38ed74&e=19cebfe173).
***
**ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS**

**_For the sake of our environment and our economy, vote Phil Scott_**
“With the wiser policies advocated by Phil Scott we can reduce our carbon footprint, protect our landscape and reduce our energy costs.” – Dave Kelley, Greensboro (Source: Caledonian Record: [Full Letter](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=c9ac77e7eb&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil will bring voters across party lines_**
**“** Lawmakers aren’t the only ones willing to cross party lines and vote for the Republican candidate for governor this year. Some voters say they like Scott because he has experience running a successful construction business.” (Source: Vermont Watchdog: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3fc7ebbd8f&e=19cebfe173))

**_Phil: Fighting for Affordability_**
“I go back to looking at things very simply: Does this raise taxes? Does this raise the burden on Vermonters? And if so, I think we should put it aside.” (Source: Vermont Public Radio: [Full Story](http://philscott.us13.list-manage1.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=3f5e6a24e4&e=19cebfe173))
***
**ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS**

**_Peter Miller in VT Digger: I Am Vermont Broke_**
In a brave and honest commentary this week, 82-year-old photographer and author Peter Miller declared **“I am Vermont broke.”** Peter, who contributed a similarly insightful article earlier this year where he interviewed fellow self-employed Vermonters **“who do not have enough income to survive in the new Vermont of high taxes and fees** ,” dedicated his latest article to his own struggles. The challenges Peter faces are the same challenges so many Vermonters we are facing. **Peter details his financial hardships despite always working hard and living within his means, while his state government has failed him by not doing the same**. We want you to know we hear you Peter. Phil hears you. Thank you for sharing your story. Please read Peter’s full article [HERE](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=f0110763a6&e=19cebfe173).
*******
Thanks to everyone that came out to events this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – [@PhilScott4VT](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=430f871760&e=19cebfe173) and [https://www.facebook.com/PhilScottforVermont/](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=19e913cf1b&e=19cebfe173).

Sincerely,
Team Scott

WE’RE NOT SLOWING DOWN ANYTIME SOON Team Scott kept its momentum going this week, hitting the fairgrounds at the Orleans County Fair and Vermont State Fair , enjoying BBQ inWindsor County and Castleton , meeting and greeting with Vermonters in Morrisville and Burlington’s Breakwaters , and stopping by the Welch Barn and Parro’s Gun Shop. We had an amazing week discussing the economic challenges and hopes of Vermonters, and seeing some of the great cultural and business treasures our state has to offer. Photo Credit: @PhilScott4VT Want to participate in an upcoming event? Check out our events page . ICYMI: PHIL IN THE NEWS For the sake of our environment and our economy, vote Phil Scott “With the wiser policies advocated by Phil Scott we can reduce our carbon footprint, protect our landscape and reduce our energy costs.” – Dave Kelley, Greensboro (Source: Caledonian Record: ) Phil will bring voters across party lines “ Lawmakers aren’t the only ones willing to cross party lines and vote for the Republican candidate for governor this year. Some voters say they like Scott because he has experience running a successful construction business.” (Source: Vermont Watchdog: ) Phil: Fighting for Affordability “I go back to looking at things very simply: Does this raise taxes? Does this raise the burden on Vermonters? And if so, I think we should put it aside.” (Source: Vermont Public Radio: ) ICYMI: THIS WEEK’S #GOODREADS Peter Miller in VT Digger: I Am Vermont Broke In a brave and honest commentary this week, 82-year-old photographer and author Peter Miller declared “I am Vermont broke.” Peter, who contributed a similarly insightful article earlier this year where he interviewed fellow self-employed Vermonters “who do not have enough income to survive in the new Vermont of high taxes and fees ,” dedicated his latest article to his own struggles. The challenges Peter faces are the same challenges so many Vermonters we are facing. Peter details his financial hardships despite always working hard and living within his means, while his state government has failed him by not doing the same. We want you to know we hear you Peter. Phil hears you. Thank you for sharing your story. Please read Peter’s full article . Thanks to everyone that came out to events this week. Be sure to follow along with the campaign’s activities everyday – and share your thoughts – and . name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Now, it’s up to us to put her in the White House
body:
A historic day in a historic race | Derek --

Today is Women’s Equality Day, when we honor the many, many people who worked so damn hard for so damn long to get us where we are today.

We’re celebrating those who went to Seneca Falls in 1848 and those who picketed for the right to vote in D.C in 1917. Those who cast their first ballots after the Nineteenth Amendment was ratified in 1920 and those who let their little girls stay up late to watch our future first woman president accept her party’s nomination last month.

Derek, today's a day when we should look back and feel grateful for those who made this campaign possible -- and when we need to take a hard look at where we’re at and the path forward for women’s equality.

For the sake of all those who fought for us to be able to vote on November 8th, we cannot possibly elect Donald Trump.

This is a man who calls women “dogs[s]” and “fat pig[s]”. He’s said that those who seek abortions should be punished and women who get pregnant are an inconvenience for their employers. While Hillary went to Beijing to tell the world that “women’s rights are human rights,” Trump was telling all who would listen that he’d work hard to make the Miss Universe bathing suits smaller and the heels higher.

This man’s views on women are offensive and regressive, and they turn back the clock in a manner we can’t possibly afford or allow. **[Please, chip in $1 today to ensure that his misogyny never finds a home in the White House.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjYzNTAxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0Njk1OTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I don't need to tell you that Hillary has been battling for women’s rights for her entire life. For decades before that now-famous speech in Beijing and every single year since she spoke those fateful words, she’s been reiterating the same message: that our country will never, ever reach its full potential until little girls can dream of being president just as much as little boys do.

Now, it’s up to us to put her in the White House. For the sake of all our mothers and grandmothers who fought for this moment to be possible -- and for the sake of all of our daughters and grandchildren who will grow up in the world we shape at the polls this fall.

Today is the 96th anniversary of women winning the right to vote in the United States (though the fight for women of color carried on through the civil rights movement) -- a lot has changed in those 96 years. Women are now a majority of the electorate. **Because of this team, we now have our first woman ever as a major party’s presidential nominee:**

[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjYzNTAxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0Njk1OTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjYzNTAxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODY0Njk1OTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
You’re the best, Derek!

Thanks again,

Mini

Mini Timmaraju
Women's Outreach Director
Hillary for America

|

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Keeping Maryland Blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

With just 73 days until Election Day the Republican machine is starting to work overtime.

GOP operatives and their big donors are determined not to lose control of the U.S. Senate. They are busy plotting surprises in campaigns across the country. And Maryland is no exception.

We recently confirmed that, in addition to support from the NRA and the founder of the notorious Citizens United, my opponent is now being helped by one of the offspring of the _Citizens United_ decision -- a shadowy dark money organization that refuses to disclose its donors is now spending secret money to elect my opponent.

That's sadly the way big money has been used to buy elections. And that's why we must be ready for anything.

**There could not be more at stake. **

Supreme Court vacancies. Overturning Citizens United. Implementing commonsense gun safety laws. Protecting a woman's right to choose. Expanding Obamacare. Securing Social Security and Medicare. Passing immigration reform. Raising the minimum wage. Providing equal pay for equal work. To name just a few.

No wonder Mitch McConnell and his big money buddies are desperate to retain control.

**[We cannot afford to let our guard down for a minute.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a07/70cdc2ba/470af6bc/397787a/636632778/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em082616_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+We+cannot+afford+to+let+our+guard+down+f&utm_campaign=em082316&source=em082316")**

The Republicans are ready to use any tactic to win this Senate seat in the fall.

**[With ten weeks left before Election Day, we must take the job ahead seriously and get every vote out to move our state and our country in the right direction on November 8th.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91a07/70cdc2ba/470af6bc/397787b/636632778/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em082616_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+With+ten+weeks+left+before+Election+Day+&utm_campaign=em082316&source=em082316")**

Thank you for your support.

Chris

>

name: Barbara Feasey
subject: Bill's commitment to service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)
body:
| [ ](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barbara0826&n=1)
---
Friend --

Many of you know Bill primarily from the campaign trail – you’ve seen his tireless commitment to addressing the problems we face in Washington State. There’s another side of him, too, and it’s what drives his commitment to public service.

Long before he first ran for office, Bill used some of his free time to volunteer as a night manager at one of the overnight shelters managed by St. Martin de Porres. Their shelters provide vulnerable homeless men a safe place to sleep. I would buy or make snacks to share with the men, and then drop Bill off in the evening and pick him up in the morning.

Last night, Bill worked a shift at Seattle's St. Martin de Porres shelter. Someone else picked him up this time, but he came home with the same determination and commitment to helping those among us who need it most.

Bill and I believe strongly in public service. That's why I am committed to helping him win in November. We need his compassionate commitment to addressing our state's most pressing issues.

We deeply appreciate your support of this commitment. Thank you.

Barbara Feasey

[**\- Contribute -**](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/support?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barbara0826&n=2) www.BillBryantForGovernor.com

Paid for by Washingtonians for Bryant (R)

We believe that email is one of the best ways to stay in touch with our supporters, but you can [click here if you would like to unsubscribe](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barbara0826&n=4) from these messages.

If you’re not interested in continuing to receive email updates, there are other ways to stay involved. You can follow our campaign on [Facebook](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fbillbryantwashington&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barbara0826&n=5) or [Twitter](http://www.billbryantforgovernor.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2FBillBryantWA&e=c9888532d2a2cbcd8e43a327c34d466d&utm_source=billbryant&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=barbara0826&n=6).

**Thank you so much for everything you’re doing to help make Washington State a better place to learn, to work, to play, and to live.**

Washingtonians for Bryant (R), P.O. Box 2121, Tacoma, WA 98401

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7de/2a380d31/11ca349e/fa69e6/3514343649/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7de/2a380d31/11ca349e/fa69e6/3514343649/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Happy Women's Equality Day, team!
On this day in 1920, our country adopted the 19th Amendment, starting the process of granting women the right to vote. Flash forward to 2016 and we're on our way to having two Democratic women from New Hampshire in the Senate and our first woman president!
We really have come so far, but we still have a long way to go. While women make up half our country's population, they make up less than 20% of Congress -- putting us well below the global average for women in government. **Women deserve equal representation in Washington.[Add your name to celebrate Women's Equality Day with Governor Hassan by committing to make equality a reality.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7de/2a380d31/11ca349e/fa69e7/3514343649/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/vote-for-womens-equality?source=e20160826_WomensEquality_v1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
With the possibility of a Trump White House pushing an extreme anti-equality agenda, it's more clear than ever that we need to elect more women. Washington Republicans have pledged to defund Planned Parenthood and block equal pay legislation, and if Trump and Ayotte are the ones nominating and confirming our next Supreme Court justices, we're willing to bet that women's health care rights would be rolled back decades.
**[Add your name to double down on the fight against the anti-woman Trump/Ayotte agenda by committing to help elect women like Maggie Hassan-- women who will never give up on making gender equality a reality.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fd7de/2a380d31/11ca349e/fa69e7/3514343649/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/vote-for-womens-equality?source=e20160826_WomensEquality_v1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**

| If you haven't been paying attention, now is the time to start.

The Primary is Tuesday, everyone. The summer's almost gone and we still have so much more to do.

**Our Primary goal is just 4 days away and I 'm beginning to freak out.**

We need to reach our $100,000 goal in the next 4 days. And when I say "need," I mean it. We're just a few points behind Rubio. What you give right now will have a huge impact.

[_**Patrick needs us all to step up -- and step up soon. Make your contribution before it 's too late >>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d72/738133e4/30a9ab4f/7f850efe/2198864036/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160826pm?refcode=pme160826pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Every dollar that comes in now is going straight to work -- buying TV air time, buying food and equipment for volunteers, printing signs and materials, and doing any of the thousand things it takes to win a campaign.

And make no mistake -- **Florida is a must-win state.** Democrats need Florida to take back control of the Senate. If we miss a single goal, we won't have any time to make it up.

**There are no second chances in a race this close.[_Don 't wait until it's too late -- give $5, $10, or whatever you can to help us reach our $100,000 goal before Tuesday._](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2d72/738133e4/30a9ab4f/7f850efe/2198864036/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme160826pm?refcode=pme160826pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**

We'll keep you posted on our progress. Thanks for helping out!
